dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8630 IH: Protecting Equal Access to Thyroid Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Rulli (for himself and Mrs. Harshbarger) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to prohibit treatment of a biologic as a biological product based solely on the presence of a protein that is a clinically inactive component in such biologic, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protecting Equal Access to Thyroid Act of 2026 or the PEAT Act of 2026.

section.header: Prohibition with respect to treatment of proteins in biologics

subsection.text: Section 351(i)(1) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 262(i)(1)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking The term and inserting the following:
by adding at the end the following:

subparagraph.text: A biologic described in subparagraph (A) may not be treated as a biological product based solely on the presence of a protein that is a clinically inactive component in such biologic.

subsection.text: Section 351(i)(1) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 262(i)(1)) is amended in subparagraph (A), as designated by subsection (a)(1), by striking protein , and inserting protein,.
